data.name: 理想のたわわ
data.detailed_description:
About

Overwhelming Immersion! The Ultimate "Bust" Simulation

Pushing the limits of Live2D, the ultimate ultra-smooth breast simulation is here!

Resize, jiggle, grab... everything is exactly as you desire.

Enjoy your "ideal bust" right through the screen.

Features

The Miracle of Illustration x Reality Brought by Live2D

"It's a 2D illustration, but it feels alive!" — Powered by Live2D technology to achieve ultimate smoothness.

Customize size, skin tone, sag, and more to satisfy your exact fetishes.

You can save and load up to 3 of your favorite presets anytime.

Nude & Outfit Gimmicks

Enjoy to the Limit! Dress-up & Nude Modes

Of course, fully uncensored "bare breasts" are included.

Furthermore, the swimsuit mode features not only color changes but also a "see-through" toggle.

Enjoy pushing the limits to match your ideal situation.

Voice

6 Premium Voices Whispering in Your Ear

She will react with adorable voices when subjected to any kind of stimulation.

Choose from 6 different voice types. Please enjoy with your favorite voice.

Sensitivity Gauge

Reactions Change! The Captivating "Sensitivity Gauge" System

Keep an eye on the "Sensitivity Gauge" in the bottom right corner. If you keep stimulating her, her reactions will begin to change.

You can also "lock" it to enjoy your favorite sensitivity level.

And when the sensitivity hits MAX, she won't just moan...?

Camera Controls

Total Freedom! Dedicated Free Camera

Zoom in, and move up, down, left, or right with complete freedom.

Enjoy the ultimate view from your very own VIP seat.

data.short_description: Experience maximum immersion with breasts crafted with meticulous attention to realistic expression using Live2D. While nothing particularly questionable is happening (presumably), you'll find the ultimate in relaxation and excitement.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 x64
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
